steps.title: Find the shared purpose
steps.content: The passage describes Herrera portraying both cultural icons who are people of color and ordinary people. It then says both approaches depict power and interconnectedness, so the main idea must cover both famous and everyday subjects.

steps.title: Reject unsupported claims
steps.content: Choice B invents a career progression from famous to everyday subjects. Choice C narrows the focus to one work and adds an unsupported comparison. Choice D introduces scholarly attention, which the passage never mentions. The answer is A.
